name: T-Flex Techvest PCB Co., Ltd.
summary: T-Flex Techvest PCB Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of FPC and PCB products in worldwide. The company provides original equipment manufacturing services for inner and outer layer printed circuit board lamination; and PCB inner layer optical inspection. Its products are used in portable device, camera module, auto CCD, key pad, cell phone, and LCM module applications, as well as applied in mobile phone, communication, mother, TFT-LCD, high density interconnection boards; and computer peripheral and consumer products, which include note book. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
